Tests for C standard library math functions (`floor`, `log`, `pow`, `round`) and a build script.


## Files
- **[test_floor.c](test_floor.c.md)**: Tests for the `floor` function in the C standard library using the Clar test framework.
- **[test_log.c](test_log.c.md)**: Tests the accuracy and behavior of the logarithm function in various edge cases.
- **[test_pow.c](test_pow.c.md)**: Tests the accuracy of the `pow` function by comparing results with a custom implementation.
- **[test_round.c](test_round.c.md)**: Tests the `round` function from the C standard library for various input values.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for testing math functions in the pebble-firmware using the clar framework.
